projects.name: remotion_teaser
projects.description: AI Agent powered tool for creating video teasers for DJ Mixes using Remotion. Automated teaser video generation with random templates and variations.
features: 5 Video Templates (cinematic-premium, neon-wave, prism-glass, cinematic-poster, mono-pulse)
Visual Effects: Light Leaks and Starburst

projects.name: wav-to-aac-converter
projects.description: AI agent for converting WAV music files into AAC or MP3 format. The tool helps to batch convert WAV to AAC or MP3, optimizes the volume (Loudness) as well as extracting metadata such as title, artist, and album cover from online sources.
features: Cover art (embedded → local → Deezer → MusicBrainz → Bandcamp)

projects.name: organize_mp3s
projects.description: AI agent tool for organizing MP3 files by extracting metadata and organizing them into a structured folder hierarchy based on artist, album, and track information.
projects.imageAlt: organize MP3s into folders by genre

projects.name: generate-mixcloud-tracklist
projects.description: AI agent tool for generating tracklists from DJ mixes by transforming a Rekordbox CUE file into a structured format Mixcloud understands.
features: Rekordbox CUE to Mixcloud tracklist conversion
